results.rendered_html:
vyāhan 2 P.
1 To obstruct, thwart, oppose, impede.
2 To repel, drive back.
3 To strike excessively.
4 To violate, transgress, disobey;  R. 19. 57. 
5 To foil, frustrate, disappoint.
6 To trouble, vex, annoy.
